name: Barrington Bank Learning Centre
brandVoice: Warm-formal and reassuring. The trusted high-street bank that has been helping people manage money since 1952. Professional but never cold. Explains things clearly without being patronising. Uses 'we' to include the reader. Measured pace — no rush, no urgency.
audienceProfile: 35-55 year-old professionals with existing savings and ISA/pension portfolios. They follow market news but don't trade actively. They want to understand how events affect their long-term wealth, not act on them daily.

ctaLibrary.text: Join our free monthly 'Markets Made Simple' webinar, hosted by our Chief Economist.
Speak to a Barrington investment advisor about how this affects your portfolio — book a free 30-minute consultation.

brandPositioning: Your bank, on your side. Barrington has been helping people build financial confidence since 1952. We make complex markets understandable so you can make informed decisions about your future.
companyBackground: Founded in 1952 as a regional building society, converted to a full-service bank in 1989
1.8 million personal banking customers across the UK
Learning Centre launched in 2020, now the most-visited section of the Barrington website
Chief Economist Dr Sarah Chen is a regular BBC Radio 4 contributor
Winner of 'Best Customer Education Programme' at UK Banking Awards 2024 and 2025
120 high-street branches with in-person financial planning services
